mapper.select: SELECT * FROM blog_image_published WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY display_order
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO blog_image_published (post_id, image_url, is_thumbnail, display_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{img.postId}, #{img.imageUrl}, #{img.isThumbnail}, #{img.displayOrder}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_image_published SET is_deleted = true WHERE post_id = #{postId}
